name: Fire Frank
dialogue: Heh. Wasn't expectin' company down here.
Watch the sparks — these tunnels burn faster than you'd think.
You ready, kid? Last chance to walk.
preBattleLine: Frank flicks a lighter open. The cave gets a few degrees warmer.
postDefeatDialogue: Ha! Burnt me good. Take the win.
Tell the snow sisters at the gate I said hi.
